action.content: Can you write rap songs about the history of the prefecture system in Japan? Give exactly two different responses separated by 6 asterisk symbols ******.
action.label: context

action.content:
(Verse 1)
The sun rose over the ancient capital,
The Emperor stood on the high platform.
He looked down at the provinces below,
And said, "Let us divide the land, let us divide the land."
He drew lines across the map,
From the north to the south,
And gave each province its own name,
A new era began to dawn.

(Chorus)
The prefecture system was born,
From the Emperor's decree,
A new way to rule the land,
With distinct boundaries, distinct sound.
From the north to the south,
The prefecture system was formed,
A new way to rule the land,
With distinct boundaries, distinct sound.

(Verse 2)
The first division was made in 604,
By Emperor Kōkan, the wise and the strong.
He divided the country into ten parts,
Each with its own capital, each with its own fate.
The provinces were named after the Emperor's family,
The Heian, the Nara, the Kamakura, the Heijo,
The Gojo, the Gojō, the Gojōs, the Gojōs,
And the Gojōs, the Gojōs, the Gojōs, the Gojōs.

(Chorus)
The prefecture system was born,
From the Emperor's decree,
A new way to rule the land,
With distinct boundaries, distinct sound.
From the north to the south,
The prefecture system was formed,
A new way to rule the land,
With distinct boundaries, distinct sound.

(Verse 3)
The system lasted for a long time,
Until the Meiji Restoration came.
The Emperor was overthrown, the old order fell,
And the new government took the land.
They abolished the prefectures, the old divisions,
And started over again, with a new vision.
The provinces were merged, the regions were united,
Into one big prefecture, one big state.
The system was changed, the old days were gone,
And the new era began to shine.

(Chorus)
The prefecture system was born,
From the Emperor's decree,
A new way to rule the land,
With distinct boundaries, distinct sound.
From the north to the south,
The prefecture system was formed,
A new way to rule the land,
With distinct boundaries, distinct sound.
action.label: response
